turns.user_message: My friend joked that I always mess up the plans. I can't stop replaying that comment.
I keep hearing echoes of that joke whenever I try to organize anything. It makes me hesitate before suggesting anything.
That one comment has grown into a truth I can't escape. I now assume I'll ruin things before I even start.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something someone else said or did. This has been going on for a while.
